Logan Mercier

13 Storm Gilchrist

13 Storm Gilchrist

  • Ht./Wt.:
    6-10 / 240
  • Position:
    F
  • Class:
    Sophomore
  • Hometown:
    Durban, South Africa
  • Prev School:
    Temple College
  • High School:
    Saint Charles College HS
  • Summary
  • Media
  • Season
  • Career

Summary

Biography

2025-26 Season
  • Appeared in 11 games
  • Averaged 10.9 minutes per game
  • Season-high eight rebounds against Maryville University (11/21)
  • Scored 56 points and posted seven assists
  • Averaged 5.1 points per game

Prior to Southern
Gilchrist transferred to MSSU from Temple College. Earned 2024-25 North Texas Junior College Athletic Conference (NTJCAC) Honorable Mention honors as a freshman. Averaged 14.5 points per conference game, shooting 73.3 percent from the field, 77.8 percent from the free-throw line, 11.8 rebounds, and three assists. Scored 21 points in Temple College's 89-83 road victory over Ranger College (1/8/25). Tallied 17 points in a 96-85 Temple College loss to Navarro College (11/9/24). Missed the bulk of conference play due to injury. Played in 19 games over his freshman campaign with four starts. Averaged 11.6 points, 8.7 rebounds over 5.1 minutes to go with 11 steals, 23 blocks, 33 assists. Attended Saint Charles College High School. Played basketball, rugby, swimming, water polo and soccer. Member of the state team for rugby and National team for basketball.
 
Personal  
Storm is the son of Stacy and Craig Gilchrist. Majoring in Kinesiology at Southern.
No stats available for the current season.
